shai.hq You can now create stunning animations in Claude Code using a single prompt.
Steps to create animations in Claude Code:
1. First, go to this website.
2. It's packed with premium Ul components - for free.
3. It has hundreds of ready-made animated components that you can use directly in Claude Code.
4. Choose the animation you like most, click "Copy Prompt," and select Claude Code.
5. Then head to the Claude terminal and paste the prompt-that's it.
Comment "Doc" to get a detailed step-by-step Notion guide on how to use Claude Code as a designer (sent to your DMS).
Also, please reshare do with your fellow designers.
April 1
